entry.title: Langfuse
entry.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, evaluation, metrics, and observability.
entry.seoDescription: Langfuse is an open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, metrics, and evaluation.
entry.author: Langfuse
entry.cardDescription: Open-source LLM tracing and evaluation platform.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Langfuse is a strong option when teams want open-source LLM observability with self-hosting and prompt lifecycle support.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
